data.content:
Implementation plan:
1. Add Invariant type and invariants field to Beat interface (types.ts)
2. Add invariants to KnotRecord, KnotUpdateInput, KnotClaimPrompt (knots.ts)
3. Add invariant CLI args to updateKnot() (knots.ts)
4. Add invariant fields to create/update schemas (schemas.ts)
5. Map invariants in toBeat() for knots-backend (knots-backend.ts)
6. Emulate invariants via notes field for beads-backend (beads-backend.ts, beads-jsonl-dto.ts)
7. Add tests for invariant support
